MINI MINUTES: Appearances on WED., SEP-10-2008: Marina Franco, counsel for plaintiffs George Chao and Joan Chao, who are both present; Claudia Jane Kingsley, limited scope attorney for defendant William Roberts, who is also present

Settlement conference held. Parties enter into a signed agreement, which is not filed with the Court this day. The SEP-15-2008 trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
